Rajasthan Engineering Admission Process.verdict_note: Values appear on the collegedekho article but are explicitly labelled 'Closing Rank 2025 (Expected)' and given as ranges (e.g. JECRC CSE '18,000-20,000' collapsed to 20000, GIT '1,800-2,200' to 2200), i.e. portal estimates not a published REAP cutoff.

Rajasthan University of Health Sciences.verdict_note: Careers360 lists RUHS B.Sc Nursing 2024 category scores; General 85 matches, but OBC 77/ST 71 don't match the govt-table values (OBC 84-85, ST 77-80) and EWS 60/ST 55 are from the private-college table, so values are plausible portal data with some category/table mixing.

Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Petroleum Tech.verdict_note: All five sampled opening/closing ranks match RGIPT's own official Round-1 2025 cutoff PDF exactly (e.g. CSE Gen 1906-14179, Chemical SC 2750-4370), but admission is via JEE Main rank not an RGIPT-specific exam, so label as proxy.

St Xavier's College Entrance Examination.verdict_note: GetMyUni lists St Xavier's Mumbai category cutoffs (BA Gen 97% 2025, BMS Gen 79.84% 2024 both confirmed); these are HSC merit percentages and the rows lack Branch so SC 58%/OBC 78% are drawn from different courses, plausible portal data.

Tamil Nadu Dr Ambedkar Law University En.verdict_note: Careers360 confirms the TNDALU 2025 merit-list cutoff marks (SOEL OC 88.680, ST 81.700, affiliated ST 69.160); these are +2 merit marks (no real entrance test) reproduced from a reputable portal.

Tata Institute of Social Sciences Bachel.verdict_note: FindMyCollege confirms the TISS 2025 cutoff percentiles (Guwahati Gen 44/EWS 41/OBC-NCL 39, Tuljapur Gen 41), but these are CUET-UG percentiles since TISS BA admits via CUET, so should be labelled as a proxy.
